title: RazingPack
description: RazingPack is a Minecraft optimization modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and enhance performance without sacrificing the vanilla feel.
body:
**🌟 RazingPack – The Ultimate Performance & Visual Upgrade for Minecraft! 🚀**

Tired of lag, stuttering, and lackluster visuals? RazingPack is the perfect blend of optimization, immersion, and quality-of-life enhancements for a smoother and more beautiful Minecraft experience. Whether you’re on a low-end PC or pushing the limits of a high-end rig, this pack will revolutionize how you play!

**🔥 What Makes RazingPack Special?
🚀 Performance Boost & FPS Optimization**

- ✔ Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, & More – Cutting-edge performance mods reduce lag, improve FPS, and optimize chunk loading.
- ✔ Entity & Particle Optimization – Mods like Entity Culling, More Culling, and Faster Random keep performance smooth.
- ✔ Dynamic FPS & ThreadTweak – Reduces background lag and optimizes game responsiveness.

**🎨 Enhanced Visuals & Immersion**

- ✔ BSL & Iris Shaders – Stunning lighting and shading with full shader support.
- ✔ Fresh Animations, Serious Player Animations, & 3D Skin Layers – More dynamic and realistic character movement.
- ✔ Presence Footsteps & Dynamic Surroundings – Deep, immersive sound design for a richer world.
- ✔ Distant Horizons – Load faraway terrain seamlessly for breathtaking landscapes.

**🏗️ Better World Generation & Structures**

- ✔ YUNG's Better Structures (Mineshafts, Strongholds, Dungeons, & More) – Overhauled vanilla structures for exciting exploration.
- ✔ WF's Cave Overhaul & Cave Dust – More atmospheric and visually engaging underground adventures.
- ✔ Falling Leaves & ImmersiveThunder – Small details that bring the world to life.

**🕹️ Quality-of-Life & Gameplay Tweaks**

- ✔ First-Person Model, OptiGUI, & Modern UI – A sleek and refined user interface.
- ✔ Too Many Players & Vivecraft Support – Enhancements for multiplayer and VR gameplay.
- ✔ Clumps & Chunky – Smarter XP handling and chunk loading for a smoother experience.

**⚡ Looking for Pure Performance?**

For players who just want raw FPS improvements without extra visual enhancements, RazingPack: Pure Performance Edition is available! This lightweight version removes unnecessary visual mods while keeping all the critical optimizations intact. Get the absolute best performance without any fluff!

-  Balanced for both Vanilla and Modded Players – No unnecessary bloat, just pure optimization and immersion.
-  Lightweight & Configurable – Works on a wide range of setups, from low-end to high-performance machines.

**🔥 Download RazingPack now and experience Minecraft like never before! 🔥**

**🚀[Pure Performance version link](https://modrinth.com/project/razingpack-pure)🚀**

**⚡Tips🚀**

- allocate as much ram as you can, this modpack will take up every gigabyte it gets.
- install the newest java runtime (23 at the moment) and add it to this modpack
- if you have a higher end pc and you are allocating 8+ GB of memory to minecraft add this to your java arguments: -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:ZUncommitDelay=600
